description: Expected validation state for mx_uam_izt_cbi — UAM Iztapalapa CBI (control adaptativo, ingeniería eléctrica)
notes: UAM Iztapalapa CBI — posgrado en ingeniería eléctrica. Alta exigencia: 2 directores + 5-person committee (presidente + 3 vocales + director), Spanish+English abstract (both present), CONAHCYT + project funding in acknowledgements, 8 BibTeX entries (article, book, inproceedings, techreport), nonlinear control math (Lyapunov, sliding mode, differential equations), 9 citation blocks distributed across 5 sections, appendix with system parameters. Tests the full CBI UAM-Iztapalapa institutional structure.
